alkylation reagent: iodoacetamide was added to a final concentration of 10 mM
alkylation concentration: iodoacetamide was added to a final concentration of 10 mM
cleavage agent: Trypsin was then added to the sample to a protease:protein ratio of 1:50 (w/w)
collision energy: using the ten most intense ions at 35% normalized collision energy
enrichment method: isolated in vitro protein complexes by immunoprecipitation (IP) with an anti-GFP antibody
labeling: peptides were analyzed using mass spectrometry (MS)
reduction reagent: Dithiothreitol (DTT) was added to a final concentration of 10 mM
reduction concentration: Dithiothreitol (DTT) was added to a final concentration of 10 mM
